GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Celebrate the joy of giving, with Harrolds this Christmas", "This has been quite the year. But with restrictions lifting and shops open again, it is all the more reason to celebrate this festive season. And there are few better ways to spread the holiday cheer than with the joy of giving. In fact, "Joy" is simply what Harrolds is all about as they celebrate Joy this Christmas. It all starts with Harrolds' luxury gifting selection. You may be familiar with their exclusive selection of brands including the likes of Tom Ford, Amina Muaddi, as well as iconic Maison Margiela, Burberry, Balenciaga, and Cire Trudon, among others. But there's even more on offer this year at Harrolds as they introduce a new collection of luxury and local homeware brands – just in time for Christmas. Harrolds newcomer En Gold is a Melbourne-based interiors label, specialising in sculptural marble plinths, tables and more – ideal for displaying a few of your favourite things. Then there's Jolie Laide, another Melbourne-based outfit offering colourful, kaleidoscopic cushions, candles and other idiosyncratic statement pieces. Finally, Degoey Planet is all about exquisite, quirky handcrafted clay and glaze ceramics. The trio of brands makes for the kinds of gifts that will create not just special moments this Christmas, but memories that will last a lifetime. If that isn't enough, Harrolds is also holding a series of special in-store activations during the Christmas period, including personalised engraving and embossing, as well as cocktails and live DJs. But if you can't get into one of their boutiques, don't worry. Harrolds' online can still offer you Christmas Joy and the best in gifting – and the good news is, Harrolds also now ships internationally. So head to Harrolds this Christmas to spread the joy of giving and find the perfect gift for that special someone – or even for yourself. Because let's face it – after the year we've all had, you deserve it. To find out more about Harrolds' range of luxury Christmas gifting products, as well as all the special events they have planned in store, follow @HarroldsAus on Instagram and head to harrolds.com.au"
